consultation_boundary: Protocol E only; each consult occurred at a recorded pathway-elimination gate.

convergence_events.reason: Source gathering was complete before any consult request was generated.
Consultation was invoked only when a pathway was about to be eliminated.
P3-P7 earned survival through existing public evidence; P8 did not.

convergence_events.claim_boundary: Consult responses challenged elimination only; they supplied no authoritative Kodak evidence.
convergence_events.dominant_conclusion: Kodak's collapse remains multi-pathway; consultation preserved five evidence-supported pathways that baseline was collapsing or weakening.
